aggregate.description: Aggregation operator.Only required for simple expression types.

column_name.description: The name of the target column

hasCustomLabel.description: When false, the label will be automatically generated based on the aggregate expression. When true, a custom label has to be specified.

isExtra.description: Indicates if the filter has been added by a filter component as opposed to being a part of the original query.

label.description: Label for the metric. Is automatically generated unlesshasCustomLabel is true, in which case label must be defined.

optionName.description: Unique identifier. Can be any string value, as long as all metrics have a unique identifier. If undefined, a random namewill be generated.

sqlExpression.description: The metric as defined by a SQL aggregate expression. Only required for SQL expression type.

timeGrain.description: Optional time grain for temporal filters
